feeding.name: Feeding
feeding.notes: Feed at consistent times. Measure portions carefully.

breed_variations.persian: Feed in quiet area due to flat face - may have difficulty eating
breed_variations.maine_coon: Larger portions - may eat more than other breeds
breed_variations.bengal: Feed frequently high-protein diet, can be food motivated
breed_variations.abyssinian: High-energy breed - ensure adequate portions to support metabolism

water_bowl_refresh.name: Refresh Water Bowl
water_bowl_refresh.description: Change water and refresh the water bowl
water_bowl_refresh.notes: Fresh water daily. Multiple water bowls recommended.

litter_box_cleaning.name: Litter Box Cleaning
litter_box_cleaning.description: Scoop clumps from litter box and add fresh litter
litter_box_cleaning.notes: Use appropriate litter for health conditions. Multiple boxes recommended.

playtime.name: Playtime
playtime.notes: Use toys, wand toys, or laser pointers. Observe energy level.

breed_variations.siamese: High energy - needs frequent interactive play
breed_variations.bengal: Very high energy - needs 30+ minutes daily
breed_variations.abyssinian: Very high energy - needs 30+ minutes daily, loves climbing and vertical play
breed_variations.persian: Low energy - keep play sessions short and gentle
breed_variations.domestic_shorthair: Moderate energy - 15-20 minutes sufficient, varies by individual

health_cautions.hypertrophic_cardiomyopathy: Keep play gentle, monitor for fatigue
health_cautions.arthritis: Avoid jumping activities, use ground-level toys

grooming.name: Grooming
grooming.description: Brush coat and check for tangles or mats
grooming.notes: Use appropriate brush for coat type. Check for mats.

breed_variations.persian: Daily brushing essential - prevents matting and breathing issues

medication.name: Medication
medication.notes: Follow vet instructions exactly. Set reminders.

eye_care.name: Eye Care
eye_care.description: Clean eyes and check for discharge or issues
eye_care.notes: Use warm water and soft cloth. Contact vet if excessive discharge.

breed_variations.persian: Daily cleaning - prone to tear staining

dental_care.name: Dental Care
dental_care.description: Brush teeth or provide dental care
dental_care.notes: Use cat-specific toothpaste. Start gradually if not used to it.

monitoring.name: Health Monitoring
monitoring.description: Monitor cat's health, appetite, energy, litter habits
monitoring.notes: Track appetite, water intake, litter habits, energy level, behavior changes.

vet_visit.name: Veterinary Checkup
vet_visit.notes: Bring medical records. Prepare list of concerns.
